memoryArtifacts.headline: Accident and Death Recorded: 9 & 10 Oct 1710 Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts for Mary (Hart) Lee-Strong
memoryArtifacts.description: Accident and Death Recorded: 9 & 10 Oct 1710 Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts for Mary (Hart) Lee-Strong: 9 Oct 1710.  "Jedediah Strong and wife set out early in the morning to visit their children at Coventry (Connecticut), but when they came against the Falls at South Hadley among the broad smooth stones, the horses feet slipped up and he fell flat on the off side, and by the fall killed the woman, tho' she was not quite dead then, but had life in her till next day, yet never spoke a word". Source: Massachusetts, Town and Vital Records, 1620-1988
memoryArtifacts.place: Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial America

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jedediah Strong於1637年5月7日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆時，他的父親Elder John Strong31歲，母親Abigail Ford11634歲。他於1662年12月18日與Freedom Woodward在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1733年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆考文垂享年96歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆考文垂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jedediah Strong于1637年5月7日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆时，他的父亲Elder John Strong31岁，母亲Abigail Ford11634岁。他于1662年12月18日与Freedom Woodward在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1733年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆考文垂享年96岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆考文垂。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

historicEvents.description: Windham County was created from Hartford and New London counties on May 12, 1726

en.lifeSummary: When Jedediah Strong was born on 7 May 1637, in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Elder John Strong, was 31 and his mother, Abigail Ford, was 11634. He married Freedom Woodward on 18 December 1662, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 22 May 1733, in Coventry, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 96, and was buried in Coventry, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Jedediah Strong(이)가 1637년 5월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elder John Strong(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Ford(은)는 11634세였다. 그는 1662년 12월 18일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 Freedom Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1733년 5월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 커븐트리에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 커븐트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jedediah Strong nasceu em 7 de maio de 1637, em Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Elder John Strong, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Ford, tinha 11634 anos. Ele casou-se com Freedom Woodward em 18 de dezembro de 1662, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1733, em Coventry, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 96 anos, e foi sepultado em Coventry, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jedediah Strong родился 7 мая 1637 г. в местности хингхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Elder John Strong было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Abigail Ford, 11634. Он женился на женщине по имени Freedom Woodward 18 декабря 1662 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер 22 мая 1733 г. в местности ковентри, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 96 лет и был похоронен в местности ковентри, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.
